title: Ternary Operator
description: Write a more concise one-line if statement using the ? and : symbols.
problemStatement:
Ternaries are short-hands for simple if-else blocks. Given `let loggedIn = true`, create a variable `status` that equals `"Online"` if loggedIn is true, and `"Offline"` otherwise. Print `status`.

**Requirement:** Use the `? :` syntax.
